profile.name: Ada Sifter
profile.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
profile.summary: Software engineer with 6 years of experience building scalable web applications and developer tools. This is a template/demo persona — replace it with your own information.

highlights: Led the migration to a microservices architecture, cutting average response time by 40%.
Provided technical leadership for a team of 5 and standardized the code review process.
Designed and shipped the internal developer portal from scratch.
Rewrote the e-commerce platform's checkout flow, reducing transaction errors by 60%.
Built a CI/CD pipeline that cut deploy time from 40 minutes to 6 minutes.

projects.name: Signal Sifter
projects.description: An open-source interactive resume template with static and AI-powered chat modes, driven entirely by JSON.

projects.name: Internal Developer Portal
projects.description: An internal tool unifying the service catalog, docs search, and deploy history in one place.
